name: population-density
title: Gridded Population Density (WorldPop)
description: 1 km resolution gridded population density for India (2020) from WorldPop — modeled from Census 2011 data and remotely-sensed landcover using random forest-based dasymetric redistribution. Values represent people per square kilometre.

files.description: 1 km gridded population density for India (2020), people per km²
